chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. D – 105 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case 1. For orders on MA No.1176/2023 (U/A) 2. For orders on MA No.1177/2023 (E/A) 3. For orders on MA No.1178/2023 (Surety Return) 07.12.2023 Mr. Abdul Majeed Memon, Advocate for applicant/surety..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is granted. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 3. This application has been filed by applicant Ghulam Yaseen seeking return of surety. As per contentions of learned Counsel for applicant, supported by report of Accountant of this Court, it appears that accused Rasool Bux Kosh, who was granted protective bail for a period of seven days, for which applicant stood surety by submitting an original Special Savings Certificate, has appeared before the trial Court within stipulated time, as is evident from the order dated 17.11.2023, passed by learned Anti- Terrorism Court, Ghotki at Mirpur Mathelo, annexed with this application. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional Prosecutor General, present in Court in some other matters, after waiving notice, has extended his no objection to grant of this application. Accordingly, listed application is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety document, as above, to the applicant after proper identification and verification, as per rules. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
